mission: Verify Capsule real provider adapters with credential-gated live operations.

tasks.title: Run Docker local live verification
successCriteria: Docker daemon is available locally
Docker sandbox and job live tests pass
No containers are left behind after failure or success

tasks.title: Run Neon branch live verification
successCriteria: NEON_API_KEY and NEON_PROJECT_ID are available only for the live command
The Neon live test creates a branch
The test deletes the branch in cleanup and records the result

tasks.title: Run Vercel deployment status live verification
successCriteria: VERCEL_TOKEN and CAPSULE_VERCEL_DEPLOYMENT_ID are available only for the live command
The Vercel live test reads an existing deployment status
No Vercel deployment or alias is created

tasks.title: Run Cloud Run service status live verification
successCriteria: Google Cloud project, location, access token, and existing service ID are available only for the live command
The Cloud Run live test reads an existing service status
No Cloud Run service is created or deleted

tasks.title: Run Cloudflare Worker version live verification
successCriteria: Cloudflare account, token, worker name, and explicit create-version flag are available only for the live command
The Cloudflare live test creates an unreleased Worker version
No route is released

tasks.title: Run Kubernetes Job live verification
successCriteria: A disposable Kubernetes namespace is configured
The Kubernetes live test creates a Job
The Job is deleted in cleanup

tasks.title: Run Fly Machine live verification
successCriteria: Fly token, app name, and test image are available only for the live command
The Fly live test creates a Machine
The Machine is destroyed in cleanup

tasks.title: Run Azure Container Apps live verification
successCriteria: Azure token, subscription, resource group, location, environment ID, and image are available only for the live command
The Azure live test deploys a Container App service
The service is deleted in cleanup

tasks.title: Run AWS Lambda invocation live verification
successCriteria: AWS region and an existing Lambda function name are available only for the live command
The Lambda live test invokes the existing function
No AWS resource is created

tasks.title: Prepare first npm publication checklist
successCriteria: Npm organization ownership and package availability are verified
Provenance and token requirements are documented
No npm publish is performed without an explicit release command
